title: FuelCell Energy Analyst Ratings and Price Targets Updates
text: FuelCell Energy (NASDAQ:FCEL) recent analyst activity shows consensus building around $8.23 average price target from 6 analysts. Most recent ratings: B. Riley Securities maintained neutral rating with $9.00 price target on March 12, 2025, expecting 34.73% upside. Jefferies and Canaccord Genuity issued ratings December 20, 2024. Price target range spans from high of $13.75 issued by UBS on December 3, 2024 to low of $1.25 from Canaccord Genuity on September 6, 2024. UBS high price target likely reflects AI/data center power market opportunity. Canaccord low target reflects historical concerns about company path to profitability and capital requirements. No recent downgrades noted in search results. B. Riley's March 2025 neutral rating suggests balanced view between market opportunity and execution risks. Analyst divergence on price targets reflects uncertainty about FCEL's ability to capitalize on emerging data center power market opportunity. Company's transformation toward distributed power generation and data center focus appears gaining credibility with research community despite historical profitability challenges.
